patches.find: (λ<sub>A</sub> is excluded because its "prediction" internally substitutes the standard-model Hubble constant H₀ = 70 km/s/Mpc.)
patches.rationale: Parenthetical is redundant with lambda_A BORROWED row-10 classification in the domain audit table. The table already explains the exclusion. Curmudgeon flagged as legacy text that can confuse readers. SEC-4.1-post-EXP-182.c1 HOLE-2.

patches.find: a single parameter pressed into service for two structurally unrelated physical phenomena (see Section 6.8: Globe Values Relabeled).
patches.replace: a single parameter pressed into service for two structurally unrelated physical phenomena (see Section 6.8: Globe Values Relabeled). See also §3.5.8 for the parallel single-pole collapse affecting WIN-012 and the κ coupling constant.
patches.rationale: Missing cross-reference to Section 3.5.8 (WIN-012 single-pole collapse). Open since cycle 2, still unaddressed after cycle 3. The two analyses share the lambda/kappa argument; readers landing on either miss the other. WIN-053.c3 HOLE-6, ISS-1128.
